articles.title: Janhvi Kapoor Reveals Her ‘Best Weight Loss Tip’ At Peddi Press Meet: ‘Try Doing A Song With Ram Charan’
articles.description: At Peddi press meet in Bangalore, Janhvi Kapoor joked that working on a song sequence with Ram Charan is the fastest way to lose weight.

articles.title: David Dhawan recalls late Rishi Kapoor turning down his film: 'He ragged everyone, even his son Ranbir Kapoor'
articles.description: Filmmaker David Dhawan recounted an interesting chapter from the making of 'Bol Radha Bol' in 1992, where the iconic Rishi Kapoor initially turned down the role, skeptical of Dühan’s skills as a burgeoning director. Yet, after some contemplation, Kapoor's willingness to join the project paved the way for an enduring friendship filled with laughter and creative sparks. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Phil Collins shares rare health update
articles.description: Legendary rocker Phil Collins has shared a positive health update, revealing that after a difficult period, he is now on the path to recovery. He detailed past struggles with his knee, requiring multiple surgeries. While unable to perform at his upcoming Rock and Roll Hall of Fame induction, Collins expressed hope for a musical return, hinting at unfinished studio work.

articles.title: Imtiaz Ali 'Can't Be Mean' To Deepika Padukone Iss Janam Mein - 'Good Girl Image' Controversy Explained
articles.description: Imtiaz Ali, who has been promoting Main Vaapas Aaunga, landed in trouble for his comment on Deepika Padukone in an interview. He took a playful dig at her 'good girl image' back in the day. Now, the filmmaker has issued a clarification.

articles.title: Shiva Rajkumar believes Ram Charan will win a National Award for Peddi: 'His transformation is brilliant'
articles.description: Kannada star Shiva Rajkumar hailed Ram Charan's performance in Peddi and praised for dedication and brilliant physical transformation.

articles.title: Varun Dhawan calls Dhurandhar only ‘director's win’, internet says he’s ‘jealous’ of Ranveer Singh
articles.description: Varun Dhawan expressed that Dhurandhar was primarily a director's success, while David Dhawan noted actors play a significant role.

articles.title: Thought of the day inspired by the Bhagavad Gita: Silence often reveals what noise cannot
articles.description: In today’s world, silence has become rare. Our lives are filled with constant notifications, endless conversations, social media opinions, and the pressure to always react immediately. Hence, out of this habit, we often indulge in pointless arguments and heated conversations.People often believe that speaking louder, responding faster, or proving themselves all the time is a sign of strength. Yet, somewhere in this noise, we tend to lose clarity, peace, and the ability to truly understand ourselves.The wisdom of the Bhagavad Gita reminds us that silence is not emptiness. It is a space where understanding grows. The thought, “Silence often reveals what noise cannot,” beautifully reflects this idea.

articles.title: 10 UNESCO World Heritage Sites in India that deserve a spot on every history and nature lover’s bucket list
articles.description: India’s UNESCO World Heritage sites are not just monuments or places, they are living examples of history, architectural brilliance and the diversity this country holds. They are not limited to monuments, it includes temples, wildlife habitats and ancient capitals.

articles.title: 'Athiradi’ BO: Tovino Thomas & Basil Joseph’s film mints over Rs 62 cr
articles.description: Athiradi continues its successful theatrical run. The film starring Tovino Thomas and Basil Joseph has crossed Rs 62 crore globally. Despite a dip in collections on Monday, its performance in overseas markets has been strong. Positive word of mouth and family-friendly content are contributing to its sustained audience interest. The movie is holding well in theatres.

articles.title: Eric Edelstein in The Boroughs mistaken for ‘tough guy’ Stranger Things actor: ‘Am I the only one?’
articles.description: Eric Edelstein gains attention for his role as Hank Williams in Netflix's The Boroughs, with viewers confusing him for David Harbour.

articles.title: Five screenings a day of Tamil films for one week from release
articles.description: Tamil Nadu theaters can now screen five daily shows of new Tamil films for a week post-release and on special days.

articles.title: Imtiaz Ali On Why He's Not Keen On Sequels, Calls Love Aaj Kal 2 A 'Useless Experiment' | Exclusive
articles.description: In an exclusive interview with Zoom, Main Vaapas Aaunga director Imtiaz Ali shared his feelings about why he's not interested in making more sequels. He also talked about the failure of Love Aaj Kal 2.

articles.title: Veterans on stage: Naseeruddin Shah & Paresh Rawal inspire young Pune audience

articles.title: Anita Kanwal recalls helping Shah Rukh Khan in his early days, never reached out for work: ‘Unko yaad bhi nahi hoga yeh sab’
articles.description: Veteran actress Anita Kanwal recently opened up about knowing Shah Rukh Khan since his Delhi theatre days, helping casting people connect with him during his struggling years, and the harsh realities faced by character actors in the entertainment industry today. She also spoke about the changing culture of Bollywood, and why reaching out to big stars and filmmakers is no longer easy.

articles.title: Vijay Announces Farm Loan Waivers, Extended Screening Of Movies
articles.description: The waivers were announced after a meeting attended by Vijay.

articles.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga Star Vedang Raina Calls Benching In Relationship ‘Moral Cheating’ – EXCLUSIVE
articles.description: In an exclusive interaction with Zoom, Main Vaapas Aaunga director Imtiaz Ali, actors Veedang Raina and Sharvari explained the meaning of a Gen-Z term 'benching' in a relationship. Vedang's statement will leave you in shock.

articles.title: Luka Doncic Shares Emotional Family Moments
articles.description: Luka Doncic shared emotional Instagram Stories featuring quiet family moments with his daughters, giving Lakers fans a rare and personal look into his life away from basketball.

articles.title: BTS Las Vegas 'Incredible' Concert Gets Special Shoutout From Diplo - Every ARIRANG Song He Reacted To
articles.description: Diplo attended BTS’ Las Vegas Day 2 concert. He produced tracks like Body to Body, FYA, Like Animals, One More Night, and Into The Sun for their ARIRANG album. The producer’s fanboy reactions from the concert quickly went viral online.

articles.title: Eldhose Kunnappilly rape case: Survivor turns hostile
articles.description: Survivor in ex-Perumbavoor MLA Eldhose Kunnappilly rape case turns hostile in Neyyattinkara court, denies assault and threats; court to decide next steps.

articles.title: Fuel price hike daylight robbery, says Pinarayi Vijayan
articles.description: Pinarayi Vijayan calls fuel price hikes “daylight robbery,” accuses Centre of looting despite falling crude, and challenges UDF to cut state taxes to lower prices.

articles.title: Late Dharmendra honoured with Padma Vibhushan; Hema Malini receives award from President Murmu

articles.title: Akshay Kumar’s First BHOJPURI Song Out | ‘Ghis Ghis Ghis’ Goes Viral | Entertainment News
articles.description: Akshay Kumar surprised fans with his first-ever Bhojpuri song 'Ghis Ghis Ghis' from Welcome To The Jungle. The energetic track featuring Bhojpuri star Akshara Singh is creating massive buzz online. Akshay’s desi Bhojpuri avatar and dance moves have grabbed social media attention soon after the song’s release. In this video: 00:00 – Akshay Kumar’s First Bhojpuri Song Released 01:00 – ‘Ghis Ghis Ghis’ Goes Viral on Social Media 02:00 – Fans Love Akshay’s Desi Bhojpuri Avatar

articles.title: ‘Girls Aloud’ star Nicola Roberts welcomes ‘perfect little’ baby girl with fiancé Mitch Hahn: ‘Haven't stopped staring at her’
articles.description: In a delightful twist to their love story, singer Nicola Roberts and her partner Mitch Hahn have a new reason to celebrate—the birth of their beautiful baby girl! They took to social media to share the joyous update, announcing that their bundle of joy has been gracing the world with her presence for a few weeks now.

articles.title: ‘He called me didi’: Kushboo Sundar recalls ’emotional’ meeting with Tamil Nadu CM Vijay
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay met actor-politician Kushboo Sundar. Despite political rivalry, they share a warm bond as she calls him her little brother.

articles.title: Make films with sensitivity, say resource persons
articles.description: Speakers at a Belagavi symposium emphasized the importance of sensitivity in filmmaking and addressing societal issues through cinema.

articles.title: ‘Diljit Dosanjh delivers a restrained performance’: Ekta Kapoor lauds Main Vaapas Aaunga
articles.description: Main Vaapas Aaunga's first review is out. Producer Ekta Kapoor cannot stop praising the Imtiaz Ali directorial, starring Vedang Raina, Sharvari, Diljit Dosanjh and Naseeruddin Shah.

articles.title: Khushbu Sundar felicitates Tamil Nadu CM Vijay: ‘It was a very emotional moment for me to see my younger brother’
articles.description: Actor and BJP member Khushbu Sundar met Tamil Nadu CM Vijay and shared that they continue to sharemutual respect and love for each other.

articles.title: Rajpal Yadav pays tribute to Prateek Yadav; Calls his death 'heartbreaking misfortune'
articles.description: Actor Rajpal Yadav paid his respects to Prateek Yadav at his terahvi ritual, expressing deep sorrow over his untimely demise. Prateek Yadav, son of Mulayam Singh Yadav, passed away at 38 due to cardiorespiratory collapse from pulmonary thromboembolism. Akhilesh Yadav also mourned the loss of his health-conscious half-brother, who largely stayed away from politics.

articles.title: Robert De Niro reflects on ‘Taxi Driver’ legacy; Actor says he never expected film to become a classic
articles.description: Robert De Niro never anticipated 'Taxi Driver' would become a cinematic masterpiece, stating success is beyond an actor's control. The iconic 1976 film, despite initial controversy, achieved critical acclaim and will be celebrated at the upcoming Tribeca Festival with a special screening and conversation featuring De Niro and Martin Scorsese.

articles.title: Soha Ali Khan Shares Sweet Birthday Post For 'Favourite Hooman' Kunal Kemmu
articles.description: Mumbai, May 25 (IANS) Actress Soha Ali Khan marked her husband Kunal Kemmu's birthday on Monday with a sweet post on her official social media handle.

articles.title: Cannes 2026: Aishwarya Rai to Alia Bhatt - 5 Best Jewellery Moments That Stole Spotlight
articles.description: From Aishwarya Rai Bachchan to Alia Bhatt, Indian stars impressed at Cannes 2026 with glamorous jewellery looks featuring diamonds, emeralds, sapphires and statement accessories on the red carpet.

articles.title: Explained | Falta repoll results: How out of fray TMC's Jahangir 'Pushpa' Khan got 7,783 votes
articles.description: TMC's Jahangir Khan who recently made headlines for likening himself to 'Pushpa' — a movie character — following his face-off with an IPS officer, received over 7,500 votes in the May 21 repolling in Falta assembly constituency of West Bengal. Khan, the TMC candidate of Falta in South 24 Parganas district, had withdrawn from the race hours before campaigning was scheduled to close for the re-election

articles.title: Chaitali Kohli: An actor’s work doesn’t begin and end on set
articles.description: Actress Chaitali Kohli emphasises that discipline and consistency are crucial for navigating the unpredictable entertainment industry.

articles.title: Take away everything, and I should be able to build it again: Rajeev Khandelwal
articles.description: Rajeev Khandelwal, driven by instinct, navigated television, films, and OTT without a fixed path, stepping away from daily soaps at his peak. He emphasizes self-belief over industry norms, choosing roles that resonate with him and refusing to be confined by a single medium. Khandelwal's career is marked by unconventional choices and a commitment to authenticity.

articles.title: A boy who once danced on national TV now sells samosas to support his family: What went wrong
articles.description: Shyam Nath Goswami, once a promising dancer discovered by 'Dance India Dance', now runs a samosa stall in Hyderabad. A family tragedy shifted his focus from his dreams to his responsibilities, forcing him to support his family. Despite the challenges, he continues to dance for smaller events, showcasing his enduring resilience.

articles.title: OTT Releases This Week: Spider Noir to Kara, Big Titles Hit Streaming Platforms!
articles.description: OTT releases this week include Spider-Noir, Dead Man’s Wire, A Good Girl’s Guide to Murder Season 2, Jetlee, and Kara. The lineup features crime, thriller, and drama stories across Netflix, Prime Video, and JioHotstar.

She was unaware her vocals would feature for actresses Jacqueline Fernandez, Disha Patani, and Raveena Tandon until later. Priya hopes this significant project marks a breakthrough in her Bollywood career.

Netizens criticized her expressions and execution, with some deeming it disrespectful to the classical art form. While some defended the scene as a college cultural event performance, others compared her to acclaimed dancers like Sridevi and Sai Pallavi.

articles.title: Meghan Markle's luxury image raises new security concerns
articles.description: Security experts are raising alarms over Meghan Markle's recent public displays of expensive jewelry and designer fashion, estimating over $110,000 worth of items in a promotional campaign. Insiders suggest this visible wealth could intensify her vulnerability, potentially attracting unwanted attention and increasing risks like kidnapping or heists for the Duchess.

articles.title: 'Rick and Morty Season 9': Where and when to watch the sci-fi comedic animated series?

Fans in India can catch it on Netflix a few weeks later. Excitingly, a feature film is also in development, promising more adventures from the beloved mad scientist and his grandson.

articles.description: Ayushmann Khurrana’s ‘Pati Patni Aur Woh Do’ continues its steady box office journey despite mixed reviews and fresh competition. The romantic comedy has now crossed the Rs 50 crore mark worldwide after a decent second weekend boost
